command:
python -c 
import urllib.request

# Try Internet Archive / Wayback for cached PDF
urls = [
    'https://web.archive.org/web/2024/https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/pdfdirect/10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240',
    'https://scholar.archive.org/search?q=doi:10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240',
    'https://api.fatcat.wiki/v0/release/lookup?doi=10.1113/jphysiol.2008.161240',
]
headers = {'User-Agent': 'research bot mailto:a.nikolaev@sheffield.ac.uk'}
for url in urls:
    try:
        req = urllib.request.Request(url, headers=headers)
        with urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=15) as resp:
            print(f'URL: {url}')
            print(f'Status: {resp.status}, Content-Type: {resp.headers.get("Content-Type","")}')
            data = resp.read(2000)
            print(data[:500])
            print()
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'URL: {url} -> Error: {e}')
        print()
